title: Apple Health daily summary — TRMNL webhook payload (v1)
description: Body POSTed by the Health for TRMNL iOS app to a TRMNL/LaraPaper webhook plugin endpoint (POST /api/custom_plugins/{uuid}). The merge_variables object is the contract the Apple Health recipe renders
$comment: Evolution rules: additive-only within v1 — new metrics are added as OPTIONAL properties here in the same PR that teaches the app to send them. Never remove, rename, retype, or change the unit of an existing key (a unit change is a rename). Metrics the user denied access to are OMITTED, never null. Breaking change: fork to health-summary.v2.schema.json and bump schema_version.

health_summary.description: One day of aggregated Apple Health metrics. Every metric is optional; the recipe must render gracefully with any subset present

schema_version.description: Contract major version. Bumped only on breaking changes; the recipe may branch on it

date.description: Local calendar day the summary covers (RFC 3339 full-date, in the user's timezone)

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the payload was generated (RFC 3339 date-time)

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier the daily aggregation was computed in

steps.description: Total step count for the day

distance_km.description: Walking and running distance in kilometers

stand_hours.description: Apple Stand ring hours (hours with at least one minute of standing movement)

resting_heart_rate_bpm.description: Resting heart rate in beats per minute

hrv_ms.description: Heart rate variability (SDNN) in milliseconds, averaged over the day

vo2_max.description: Most recent VO2 max (cardio fitness) in mL/kg/min. Not a daily aggregate; the Watch records it after qualifying outdoor workouts

weight_kg.description: Most recent body mass in kilograms

goals.description: The user's Activity ring goals from the Fitness app

sleep.description: Aggregated sleep for the night ending on `date`

goals.description: Activity ring goals. Each goal is omitted when not configured on the device (Exercise and Stand goals require an Apple Watch; the Move goal is omitted for minutes-based Move mode)

sleep.description: Aggregated sleep session. Stage minutes are present only when the sleep source records stages

total_minutes.description: Minutes asleep across all stages, excluding awake time

awake_minutes.description: Minutes awake during the sleep session

daily_minutes.description: Whole minutes within a single day

daily_hours.description: Whole hours within a single day

clock_time.description: Local time of day as HH:MM (24-hour)
